checks.CROSS_SECTION_DIFFERENTIATION: PASS (0 avoidable; 272 unavoidable accepted as EXIT 2)
checks.PAPER_TIER_FLOOR: DOCUMENTED_EXIT (EXIT 1: sections 04, 09 below floor due to Phase 2 saturation)
checks.CITE_KEY_ASSIGNED: PASS (0 missing; 192/194 synthesized resolved via CrossRef+arXiv; 2 fallback retained)

documented_exits.name: PAPER_TIER_FLOOR
documented_exits.rationale: Sections 04 (Morphology, 33 papers vs 47 floor) and 09 (Brain Regions, 40 papers vs 70 floor) below tier floor. Cause: clusters 03 and 08 reached saturation in Phase 2V at lower paper counts than cross-cluster mean (116.8). 100% of available evidence is captured. Accepted as saturation outcome documented in phase5_exit_decision.md.

documented_exits.name: CROSS_SECTION_DIFFERENTIATION_UNAVOIDABLE
documented_exits.rationale: 272 unavoidable cases where Phase 2 source data has only one claim_source_sentence per DOI. Avoidable cases = 0 post-patch. Re-extracting alternative CSS would require fulltext fetch + reparse for ~272 papers; deferred to future review pipeline improvements (extract >=2 CSS per multi-cluster paper at Phase 2).

advance_decision: Approved to proceed to Phase 6 (Figure Audit).
